title: #claude Chat vs. Cowork: Biggest 3 differences
summary: Claude Cowork is an upgraded version of Claude Chat that reads directly from a user's computer rather than requiring cloud uploads, offers a larger context window, and generates ready-to-use output files. The video compares three key differences: file handling, context window size, and output format.
